info.description: Automatically generated from UX flow documentation with testing guides.

item.name: 🚀 Testing Guide & Docs
item.description:
## Welcome to tbsosick API Testing Guide

Follow these detailed steps to test APIs and Socket events:

### 1. Setup & Auth (First Step)
1.  **Login**: First, go to **App Screens > Auth > 1.2 Login**.
2.  **Auto-Token**: Successful login korle `accessToken` automatic collection variable-e save hoye jabe.
3.  **Check**: Apni Collection-er **Variables** tab-e giye check korte paren token-ti set hoyeche kina.

### 2. Standard API Testing
- Protiti folder screen-er nam onujayi organized.
- Path variables (যেমন `:id`) thakle Postman-er **Params** tab-e value boshate hobe.

### 3. Socket.IO Testing (Detailed Guide)
Postman theke Socket test korar jonno nicher visual guide-ti follow koren:

#### A. Connection Setup
- Click **New** > **Socket.IO**.
- **URL**: `http://localhost:5000` (Not `/api/v1`).
- **Auth (Handshake)**:
    - **Handshake** tab-e jan.
    - **Auth** section-e **Auth Object** select koren.
    - `token` key-te value `{{accessToken}}` boshie **Connect** koren.

#### B. How to "Listen" (Receive events from server)
Server theke real-time data receive korar jonno nicher steps follow koren:

1.  **Events Tab**: Connection tab-er pashe thaka **Events** tab-e jan.
2.  **Add Event**: `Add event` button-e click koren.
3.  **Event Name**: `Event name` field-e nicher common event-gulo add koren (ekekti event-er jonno alada row):
    - `USER_ONLINE`: Jokhon keu online ashe.
    - `MESSAGE_RECEIVED`: Jokhon keu apnake message pathay.
    - `TYPING_START`: Keu type kora shuru korle.
    - `get-notification::{{userId}}`: Personal notifications-er jonno.
4.  **Messages Pane**: Ekhon server theke oi event-ti asle niche **Messages** pane-e real-time JSON data dekhabe. 
    > **Note**: Ekhane kono JSON pathano lagbe na, shudhu event-er nam-ti add korlei Postman server theke asha data capture korbe.

#### C. How to "Emit" (Send events to server)
- Server-e data pathanor jonno **Message** tab-e jan.
- **Event Name**: Jekhane event-er nam likhte hoy (যেমন: `JOIN_CHAT`).
- **Payload**: Niche JSON format-e data-ti likhun:
    ```json
    { "chatId": "664a1b2c3d4e5f6a7b8c9d0e" }
    ```
- Click **Send**.

### 🔌 Socket.IO Events Inventory & Guide

Jokhon apni Socket test korben, nicher table-ti follow koren bujhar jonno je konta apnake pathate hobe (Emit) ar konta server pathabe (Listen).

| Event Name | Action Type | Direction | Payload Example | Step-by-Step Testing |
|------------|-------------|-----------|-----------------|----------------------|
| `JOIN_CHAT` | **EMITTING** (Send) | 📥 Client -> Server | `{ "chatId": "66..." }` | **Message** tab-e event name `JOIN_CHAT` likhun ebong payload JSON format-e diye **Send** koren. |
| `LEAVE_CHAT` | **EMITTING** (Send) | 📥 Client -> Server | N/A | **Message** tab-e event name `LEAVE_CHAT` likhe JSON payload shoho **Send** koren. |
| `TYPING_START` | **EMITTING** (Send) | 📥 Client -> Server | `{ "chatId": "66..." }` | **Message** tab theke emit koren typing shuru bujhate. |
| `TYPING_STOP` | **EMITTING** (Send) | 📥 Client -> Server | N/A | **Message** tab-e event name `TYPING_STOP` likhe JSON payload shoho **Send** koren. |
| `DELIVERED_ACK` | **EMITTING** (Send) | 📥 Client -> Server | N/A | **Message** tab-e event name `DELIVERED_ACK` likhe JSON payload shoho **Send** koren. |
| `READ_ACK` | **EMITTING** (Send) | 📥 Client -> Server | N/A | **Message** tab-e event name `READ_ACK` likhe JSON payload shoho **Send** koren. |
| `disconnect` | **EMITTING** (Send) | 📥 Client -> Server | N/A | **Message** tab-e event name `disconnect` likhe JSON payload shoho **Send** koren. |
| `TYPING_START` | **LISTENING** (Receive) | 📤 Server -> Client | `{ "chatId": "66..." }` | **Events** tab-e `TYPING_START` add koren listening-er jonno. |
| `TYPING_STOP` | **LISTENING** (Receive) | 📤 Server -> Client | N/A | **Events** tab-e `TYPING_STOP` nam-er ekta event add koren jate server theke response ashole apni **Messages** pane-e dekhte paren. |


### 4. Common Testing Scenarios
- **Chatting**:
    1. Login koren.
    2. Socket connect koren.
    3. `JOIN_CHAT` emit koren chatId diye.
    4. Onno user theke message pathale apni listener events-e sheta paben.

request.description: Content favorite list-e add korar jonno.
Favorite list theke remove korar jonno.
Video player theke heartbeat ba pause hole watch progress sync korar jonno. Eta admin dashboard-er "Real Engagement" analytics-er jonno proyojon.
Shots (short videos) er list fetch korar jonno.
Shot favorite list-e add korar jonno.
Shot favorite list theke remove korar jonno.
Shot-er share count track korar jonno.

request.description: Dashboard-er summary cards-er jonno ei endpoint use hoy. Monthly growth calculate kore: current month vs last month.
Visitors-er analytics chart render korar jonno data return kore. Multiple time ranges support kore.
Watchlist-er status breakdown return kore categorized by categories (Views based).
For the summary stat cards in the user management section.
Handles user list search, filtering, and pagination.
Updates user details or status.
Permanently removes a user account.
Exports the filtered user list to a CSV file.
Deletes multiple user accounts in a single request.
For the summary stat cards in the dashboard's movies section. Returns total movies, likes, views, and Click-through Rate (CTR).
Handles movies list search, filtering, and pagination. Table columns mapping: Title, Image, Duration, Status.
Toggles the movie status between `PUBLISHED` and `DRAFT`.
Permanently deletes the movie.

body.raw:
{
  "title": "Inception",
  "description": "A thief who steals corporate secrets...",
  "genres": ["Sci-Fi", "Action"],
  "duration": 148,
  "releaseYear": 2010,
  "rating": 8.8,
  "videoUrl": "https://bucket.s3.region.amazonaws.com/videos/inception.mp4",
  "trailerUrl": "https://bucket.s3.region.amazonaws.com/trailers/inception-trailer.mp4",
  "poster": "https://bucket.s3.region.amazonaws.com/posters/inception-poster.jpg",
  "thumbnail": "https://bucket.s3.region.amazonaws.com/thumbnails/inception-thumb.jpg",
  "availability": "MONTHLY",
  "isDraft": false
}

request.description: Updates existing movie details. Only changing fields should be sent (Partial update).
Movie performance er birds-eye view return kore. Comparison with typical performance included.
Watch time ebong audience retention metrics return kore.
Subscriber status, demographics, ebong geography data return kore.
Revenue trend, breakdown, ebong conversion metrics return kore.
For the summary stat cards in the dashboard's series section.
Handles series list search, filtering, and pagination.
Creates a new series entry. Episodes are added later via the Series Details screen.
Updates series metadata, cast, or media files.
Permanently removes a series and all its episodes.
Toggles the visibility of the series (Draft vs Published).
Returns high-level details for a specific series.
Returns a paginated list of episodes for a series, filtered by season or search term.
Adds a new episode to a specific series.
Handles genre list search, filtering, and pagination.
Creates a new movie/series genre.
Updates an existing genre's details.
Removes a genre from the system.
For the summary stat cards in the dashboard's subscription section.
Handles subscription records search, filtering, and pagination.
For the summary stat cards in the dashboard's revenue section.
Handles transaction list search, filtering, and pagination.
